signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**[1]  
The official launch of Ripple USD (RLUSD) across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum is driving massive capital influx and record XRPL transaction volumes, following SEC case resolution and amid XRP ETF final approvals.[1]

signals.headline: Fed Chair Powell Confirms Tariff-Driven Goods Inflation Peaking Q1 2026, Expects Easing Mid-2026 Absent New Tariffs | YE
signals.raw:
Fed Chair Powell Confirms Tariff-Driven Goods Inflation Peaking Q1 2026, Expects Easing Mid-2026 Absent New Tariffs | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Powell described the economy as "very unusual" with tariff-fueled goods inflation elevated but transitory, peaking around Q1 2026 if no further tariff rounds occur, while non-tariff inflation is in the low 2% range and services/wage pressures cool[1][4][5]
matched_markets: Will Powell say "Tariff inflation" during April press conference?

signals.headline: Ripple Announces Multi-Phase Quantum Resistance Roadmap for XRP | YES | MED confidence**[3]
signals.raw:
Ripple Announces Multi-Phase Quantum Resistance Roadmap for XRP | YES | MED confidence**[3]  
As of April 20, 2026, Ripple outlined Phase 1 with a roadmap including H1 2026 risk assessments and post-quantum signatures to future-proof XRP against quantum computing threats.[3]

signals.headline: Elon Musk April Tweets Dominate Polymarket Chatter | NO whale bets or resolutions confirmed | LOW confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk April Tweets Dominate Polymarket Chatter | NO whale bets or resolutions confirmed | LOW confidence**

Polymarket's most active markets focus on **Elon Musk tweet counts**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (priced at implied probabilities like 29% for 180-199 tweets) and "Elon Musk # tweets in April 2026?" (28% for 1120-1159, previously 18% for 1080-1119).[1][2][3]
